title: MD
biography: Sigmund Freud was an Austrian neurologist who founded psychoanalysis, one of the most influential intellectual frameworks of the 20th century. His theories on the unconscious mind, dream interpretation, and psychosexual development shaped psychiatry, psychology, and culture.
aiSummary: Sigmund Freud is a psychiatry specialist at University of Vienna. Based in Vienna.

timeline.title: Published The Interpretation of Dreams
timeline.description: Laid the foundation of psychoanalytic theory

timeline.title: Published The Ego and the Id
timeline.description: Introduced the structural model of the psyche: id, ego, and superego
